narrative:
Napoleon Township has 6,604 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.1 percentage points.
